text:
Created attachment 248079
crashdump

Running freebsd 14.0-release with xorg can trigger a GPU driver related crash at random intervals. The currently open program does not matter, i've encountered crashes by just opening xfce4-settings or playing OpenArena. I'm attaching the crashdump

My GPU is AMD Radeon RX6700XT
